name: DAC7678
description: The DAC7678 output component exposes a DAC7678 DAC channel of a global [DAC7678 hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/dac7678#dac7678-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the DAC7678 of this output component. Must be in range from 0 to 7.

config_entries.label: DAC7678 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [DAC7678 hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/dac7678#dac7678-component). Use this if you have multiple DAC7678 devices.
